diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono export, Context, HonoRequest, types exports (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, Input, Schema, etc.)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase types
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exports Hono class and all major types from submodules.
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Hono class and types from './hono', './types', './context', './request', './client'
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, Input, Schema, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, TypedResponse, HTTPResponseError, HonoRequest
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPResponseError, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Core request/response type definitions for Hono framework.
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports all type interfaces for routes, handlers, context, request, and HTTP response errors.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankRouter, Router
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class with routing and SmartRouter as default.
+- Copy-safe detail: Hono class extends HonoBase, constructor sets up routing with multiple router strategies.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, patch, options, all, on, onError, use, fire, onAny
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Router, blankRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ./hono, ./utils/types, ./utils/regex, ./utils/urlpath, ./utils/body, ./utils/http-status, ./request, ./context, ./utils/accept-header
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with routing, middleware execution, request/response handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements route registration (get, post, etc.), execute() dispatches to compose, handles errors via onError.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: status, set, get, req, res, new Response, getHeader, getHeaders, getMethod, getPath, getRequest, getVariable, setHeader, setBody, json, html, text, redirect, error, variable
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, HTTPException, ContextVariableMap, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request, ./utils/header, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/secure-headers
+- Plain-English summary: Request context object with response rendering and variable storage.
+- Copy-safe detail: Context has request object, response methods, and variables map for request lifecycle.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: header, method, param, query, form, body, raw, isJSON, json, parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, body, regex, cookie, url, formData, json
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./utils/body, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/secure-headers, ./utils/filepath, ./utils/headers, ./utils/urlpath
+- Plain-English summary: Request handler with body parsing, headers, query params, and routing.
+- Copy-safe detail: Handles GET request matching against route, extracts body/form/query/header data.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Export symbol for matching GET method result.
+- Copy-safe detail: Single unique symbol export for GET method match result tracking.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: body
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, readBody
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ../utils/formdata, ../raw-body
+- Plain-English summary: Utility for parsing request body data.
+- Copy-safe detail: Type definitions for body data handling, string/File/object values.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index, middleware, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Error
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Composes middleware functions into single request handler.
+- Copy-safe detail: dispatch function iterates middleware array, handles errors via onError callback.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException, getResponse
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, HTTPResponseError, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException class for throwing HTTP errors.
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends Error with status, res, message, and getResponse() method.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client module exports for Hono HTTP client.
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports hc from ./client, parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils.
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Parse fetch Response and detect content type, throw detailed errors.
+- Copy-safe detail: fetchRP function parses response, throws DetailedError on non-2xx status.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: hc, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Internal names noticed: Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/types (UnionToIntersection)
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client.
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines hc function, Fetch path, type inference utilities, response filtering.
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, parseResponse, DetailedError, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL handling and request building.
+- Copy-safe detail: URL manipulation functions, search params builder, deep object merge, parseResponse wrapper.
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc, $get, $post, $put, $delete, $patch, $options, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequestError
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, Callback, Fetch, buildRequestUrl, buildRequestBody, parseBody
+- Imports or neighbors: '../hono', '../types', '../utils/cookie', './utils', ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client request implementation with proxy for method routing.
+- Copy-safe detail: hc returns proxy wrapping fetch requests, implements all HTTP methods with type inference.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, HandleOptions, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ./handler, ./types, ../hono, ../types
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app to handle fetch events in service worker.
+- Copy-safe detail: fire() function calls addEventListener with handle() to intercept fetch events.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: handle, FetchEvent, FetchRequest, HandleOptions, Request, Response
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ../hono, ../types
+- Plain-English summary: Handler that processes fetch events through Hono app.
+- Copy-safe detail: handle function returns Handler that wraps app.fetch, opts.fetch fallback for 404s.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent
+- Internal names noticed: waitUntil, preloadResponse, handled
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for Service Worker event and request objects.
+- Copy-safe detail: Define FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with service worker properties.
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact file by first reading all the listed files in the repository, then extracting specific information about each file, and writing everything to a new markdown file. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files
3. Extract: Public surface, Internal names noticed, Imports or neighbors, Plain-English summary, and Copy-safe detail for each file
4. Add a Path Inventory section with all file paths as bullets
5. Save to bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files.
I'll start by creating the bench-artifacts directory and reading all the listed files.
